Bash(cd /e/mod/PochiMod && python << 'PYEOF'
import os
import re

base = "src/main/java/net/pochi/pochimod"

def fix_file\(filepath\):
    with open\(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        content = f.read\(\)
    
    original = content
    
    # Remove old imports
    content = content.replace\('import net.neoforged.neoforge.registries.ForgeRegistries;\\n', ''\)
    content = content.replace\('import net.neoforged.neoforge.registries.RegistryObject;\\n', ''\)
    
    # Add new imports if not present
    if 'import net.minecraft.core.registries.Registries;' not in content and 'Registries.BLOCK' in content.replace\('import net.neoforged.neoforge.registries.ForgeRegistries;', ''\):
        if 'import net.neoforged.neoforge.registries.DeferredRegister;' in content:
            content = content.replace\(
                'import net.neoforged.neoforge.registries.DeferredRegister;',
                'import net.minecraft.core.registries.Registries;\\nimport net.neoforged.neoforge.registries.DeferredRegister;'
            \)
    if 'import net.neoforged.neoforge.registries.DeferredHolder;' not in content:
        if 'import net.neoforged.neoforge.registries.DeferredRegister;' in content:
            content = content.replace\(
                'import net.neoforged.neoforge.registries.DeferredRegister;',
                'import net.neoforged.neoforge.registries.DeferredHolder;\\nimport net.neoforged.neoforge.registries.DeferredRegister;'
            \)
    
    # Fix ForgeRegistries references
    content = content.replace\('ForgeRegistries.BLOCKS', 'Registries.BLOCK'\)
    content = content.replace\('ForgeRegistries.ITEMS', 'Registries.ITEM'\)
    content = content.replace\('ForgeRegistries.ENTITY_TYPES', 'Registries.ENTITY_TYPE'\)
    content = content.replace\('ForgeRegistries.BIOMES', 'Registries.BIOME'\)
    content = content.replace\('ForgeRegistries.FLUIDS', 'Registries.FLUID'\)
    content = content.replace\('ForgeRegistries.FEATURES', 'Registries.FEATURE'\)
    content = content.replace\('ForgeRegistries.SOUND_EVENTS', 'Registries.SOUND_EVENT'\)
    content = content.replace\('ForgeRegistries.TREE_DECORATOR_TYPES', 'Registries.TREE_DECORATOR_TYPE'\)

    # Add Registries import if now needed but not present
    if 'Registries.' in content and 'import net.minecraft.core.registries.Registries;' not in content:
        if 'import net.neoforged.neoforge.registries.DeferredRegister;' in content:
            content = content.replace\(
                'import net.neoforged.neoforge.registries.DeferredRegister;',
                'import net.minecraft.core.registries.Registries;\\nimport net.neoforged.neoforge.registries.DeferredRegister;'
            \)

    # Fix RegistryObject types - specific types first
    content = content.replace\('RegistryObject<LiquidBlock>', 'DeferredHolder<Block, LiquidBlock>'\)
    content = content.replace\('RegistryObject<EntityType<?>>', 'DeferredHolder<EntityType<?>, EntityType<?>>'\)
    content = content.replace\('RegistryObject<Block>', 'DeferredHolder<Block, Block>'\)
    content = content.replace\('RegistryObject<Item>', 'DeferredHolder<Item, Item>'\)
    content = content.replace\('RegistryObject<FluidType>', 'DeferredHolder<FluidType, FluidType>'\)
    content = content.replace\('RegistryObject<CreativeModeTab>', 'DeferredHolder<CreativeModeTab, CreativeModeTab>'\)
    
    # Fix generic method signatures
    content = content.replace\(
        'private static <T extends Block> RegistryObject<T> registryBlock',
        'private static <T extends Block> DeferredHolder<Block, T> registryBlock'
    \)
    content = content.replace\(
        'private static <T extends Block>RegistryObject<T> registryBlock',
        'private static <T extends Block> DeferredHolder<Block, T> registryBlock'
    \)
    content = content.replace\(
        'private static <T extends Block>RegistryObject<Item> registryBlockItem',
        'private static <T extends Block> DeferredHolder<Item, Item> registryBlockItem'
    \)
    content = content.replace\(
        ', RegistryObject<T> block\)',
        ', DeferredHolder<Block, T> block\)'
    \)
    
    if content != original:
        with open\(filepath, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
            f.write\(content\)
        print\("Fixed: " + filepath\)
    else:
        print\("No changes: " + filepath\)

files_to_fix = [
    "block/ModBlocks.java",
    "item/ModItems.java",
    "loot/ModLootModifiers.java",
    "fluid/ModFluidTypes.java",
    "item/ModCreativeModeTabs.java",
    "entity/custom/Chameleon.java",
    "entity/custom/Ant.java",
    "datagen/ModItemModelProvider.java",
    "datagen/ModBlockStateProvider.java",
    "datagen/ModBlockLootTables.java",
    "world/feature/ModConfiguredFeatures.java",
]

for f in files_to_fix:
    full_path = os.path.join\(base, f\)
    if os.path.exists\(full_path\):
        fix_file\(full_path\)
    else:
        print\("NOT FOUND: " + full_path\)

print\("Done!"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(cd /e/mod/PochiMod && python << 'PYEOF'
import os
import glob

base = "src/main/java/net/pochi/pochimod"

def fix_geckolib\(content\):
    # core.animatable.instance -> animatable.instance
    content = content.replace\(
        'software.bernie.geckolib.core.animatable.instance.',
        'software.bernie.geckolib.animatable.instance.'
    \)
    # core.animation.* -> animation.*
    content = content.replace\(
        'software.bernie.geckolib.core.animation.',
        'software.bernie.geckolib.animation.'
    \)
    # core.object.PlayState -> animation.PlayState
    content = content.replace\(
        'import software.bernie.geckolib.core.object.PlayState;',
        'import software.bernie.geckolib.animation.PlayState;'
    \)
    # core.object.* -> animation.*
    content = content.replace\(
        'software.bernie.geckolib.core.object.',
        'software.bernie.geckolib.animation.'
    \)
    # core.controller.* -> animation.*
    content = content.replace\(
        'software.bernie.geckolib.core.controller.',
        'software.bernie.geckolib.animation.'
    \)
    return content

fixed = 0
for root, dirs, files in os.walk\(base\):
    for f in files:
        if f.endswith\('.java'\):
            filepath = os.path.join\(root, f\)
            with open\(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as fh:
                content = fh.read\(\)
            if 'software.bernie.geckolib.core.' in content:
                new_content = fix_geckolib\(content\)
                if new_content != content:
                    with open\(filepath, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as fh:
                        fh.write\(new_content\)
                    print\("Fixed GeckoLib: " + filepath\)
                    fixed += 1

print\("Total fixed: " + str\(fixed\)\)
PYEOF)

Bash(cd /e/mod/PochiMod && python << 'PYEOF'
import os

base = "src/main/java/net/pochi/pochimod"

def fix_file\(filepath, content\):
    original = content
    
    # BlockPathTypes -> PathType
    content = content.replace\(
        'import net.minecraft.world.level.pathfinder.BlockPathTypes;',
        'import net.minecraft.world.level.pathfinder.PathType;'
    \)
    content = content.replace\('BlockPathTypes', 'PathType'\)
    
    # @Mod.EventBusSubscriber -> @EventBusSubscriber
    if '@Mod.EventBusSubscriber' in content:
        # Add import if not present
        if 'import net.neoforged.fml.common.EventBusSubscriber;' not in content:
            # Add after @Mod import
            content = content.replace\(
                'import net.neoforged.fml.common.Mod;',
                'import net.neoforged.fml.common.EventBusSubscriber;\\nimport net.neoforged.fml.common.Mod;'
            \)
        content = content.replace\('@Mod.EventBusSubscriber', '@EventBusSubscriber'\)
        content = content.replace\('Mod.EventBusSubscriber.Bus.', 'EventBusSubscriber.Bus.'\)
    
    return content

fixed = 0
for root, dirs, files in os.walk\(base\):
    for f in files:
        if f.endswith\('.java'\):
            filepath = os.path.join\(root, f\)
            with open\(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as fh:
                content = fh.read\(\)
            new_content = fix_file\(filepath, content\)
            if new_content != content:
                with open\(filepath, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as fh:
                    fh.write\(new_content\)
                print\("Fixed: " + filepath\)
                fixed += 1

print\("Total fixed: " + str\(fixed\)\)
PYEOF)

filepath = "src/main/java/net/pochi/pochimod/datagen/ModRecipeProvider.java"

with open\(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

original = content

# Remove IConditionBuilder import and usage
content = content.replace\('import net.neoforged.neoforge.common.crafting.conditions.IConditionBuilder;\\n', ''\)
content = content.replace\(' implements IConditionBuilder', ''\)

# Add RecipeOutput import
content = content.replace\(
    'import net.minecraft.data.recipes.*;',
    'import net.minecraft.data.recipes.*;\\nimport net.minecraft.data.recipes.RecipeOutput;'
\)

# Fix Consumer<FinishedRecipe> -> RecipeOutput
content = content.replace\('Consumer<FinishedRecipe>', 'RecipeOutput'\)

# Remove java.util.function.Consumer import if only used for FinishedRecipe
# \(Keep it if used elsewhere, but it's likely not needed now\)
content = content.replace\('import java.util.function.Consumer;\\n', ''\)

# Fix constructor - add CompletableFuture<HolderLookup.Provider> registries parameter
content = content.replace\(
    'public ModRecipeProvider\(PackOutput output\) {\\n        super\(output\);',
    'public ModRecipeProvider\(PackOutput output, java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture<net.minecraft.core.HolderLookup.Provider> registries\) {\\n        super\(output, registries\);'
\)

if content != original:
    with open\(filepath, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        f.write\(content\)
    print\("Fixed ModRecipeProvider.java"\)
else:
    print\("No changes made!"\)
PYEOF)
